text.title: api-error-handling Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for api-error-handling as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Returning raw exception messages or stack traces in error responses.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Exposes internal implementation details; violates information security; confuses API consumers expecting a stable error contract.
